pi_items.metadata_value: ArchiSurance Case Study by The Open Group
pi_items.verified_value: Simplified version based on ArchiSurance; uses different specific elements than official case study
pi_items.source: Official ArchiSurance includes: Client, Handle Claim, CRM System, Claim Information System, Policy Data Management, Mainframe, UNIX Server, NAS; task uses: Customer, Submit Claim, Claims Intake Service, Policy Administration System, Document Management System, Mainframe, DB2, etc.

pi_items.verified_value: Synthetic - generated by setup_task.sh at task initialization
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 28-57 generate the definition file using heredoc (cat > ...EOF)

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetic definition file containing a simplified ArchiMate-based insurance architecture with 9 elements (3 business, 3 application, 3 technology layers) and 9 relationships. The definition is inspired by The Open Group's ArchiSurance Case Study but uses simplified, custom elements. The task requires using draw.io 26.0.9, which contains ArchiMate 3.0 shape libraries (not 3.1 as stated in task description). Output files are saved to ~/Desktop/ (claims_architecture.drawio for editable diagram and claims_architecture.png for exported image). All specified paths, element counts, and relationship requirements are verified and internally consistent.
